note: Optional per-template mining focus for dynamic tasks. Derived from pattern_catalog_snapshot.

phase1_templates.name: cross-rank-replica-equality
phase1_templates.prompt_focus: FORALL x in replicated_state, FORALL r1,r2 in replica_group(x): checksum(x, r1, step) == checksum(x, r2, step)
phase1_templates.counterexample: TP/EP-sharded tensors that are intentionally different per rank must not be compared as replicas; Local per-rank gradients inspected before the reduction collective has run

phase1_templates.name: logged-metric-reduction-consistency
phase1_templates.prompt_focus: FORALL r1,r2: logged_metric(m, r1, step) == logged_metric(m, r2, step) AND logged_metric(m, r, step) == designated_reduce({local_metric(m, r', step) : r' in world})
phase1_templates.counterexample: Per-rank local metric values differing before the explicit all-reduce point; Deliberately rank-local diagnostics documented as unreduced

phase1_templates.name: config-invariant-execution-equivalence
phase1_templates.prompt_focus: max_abs_diff(output(cfg, x, w), output(cfg_ref, x, w)) <= tol, for identical inputs x and weights w, where cfg and cfg_ref differ only in a performance-neutral knob (CP/SP degree, torch.compile on/off, recompute on/off, sharding/wrapping la
phase1_templates.counterexample: Bitwise differences within numerical tolerance caused by legitimate reduction reordering across configurations; Loss-curve differences caused by knobs that are documented to change semantics (e.g. different global batch size)

phase1_templates.name: spec-reference-conformance
phase1_templates.prompt_focus: |computed(q, x) - spec_reference(q, x)| <= tol, where spec_reference is an analytic formula or an independent reference implementation evaluated on identical inputs/weights
phase1_templates.counterexample: Implementations that intentionally deviate from a reference with documented semantics (e.g. a configured non-standard softmax scale); Tolerance-level numeric differences between fused and unfused kernels

phase1_templates.name: designated-dtype-fidelity
phase1_templates.prompt_focus: FORALL (t, site) in dtype_constrained_uses: dtype(t, site) == designated_dtype(t, mixed_precision_recipe)  -- e.g. dtype(allreduce_operand)==fp32, dtype(grad at optimizer.step)==fp32, dtype(expert_bias at forward)==fp32, dtype(router_input
phase1_templates.counterexample: Intentional low-precision reduction explicitly configured and documented by the recipe; Autocast-driven downcasts at sites the recipe designates as low-precision

phase1_templates.name: storage-dtype-interpretation-match
phase1_templates.prompt_focus: itemsize(configured_reader_dtype) == file_size_bytes / token_count AND max(observed_token_id) consistent with tokenizer vocab_size (vocab_size > 2^16 implies itemsize >= 4)
phase1_templates.counterexample: Datasets legitimately stored as uint16 for vocabularies below 65536; Files whose header/metadata declares the dtype and matches the reader

phase1_templates.name: gradient-accumulation-conservation
phase1_templates.prompt_focus: FORALL p: accum_grad(p, after N micro_steps) == SUM_{i=1..N} grad_i(p), with accum_grad(p, 0) == 0, each grad_i added exactly once to the designated buffer of p's partition owner, and padding_region(comm_buffer) == 0
phase1_templates.counterexample: A configured averaging (not summing) accumulation mode where the divisor is documented; Gradients legitimately reset to zero at accumulation-boundary steps

phase1_templates.name: scale-factor-consistency
phase1_templates.prompt_focus: applied_scale(q, step) == spec_scale(q; dp_size, cp_size, sp_size, edp_size, num_tokens, num_micro_batches, loss_scale, sample_counts, mask_valid_counts), and the factor is applied exactly once (magnitude_ratio(q, reference) == 1)
phase1_templates.counterexample: A documented change of normalization convention (e.g. per-token vs per-sequence loss) reflected consistently in config; Loss-scale growth/decay behaving per the dynamic loss-scaling policy

phase1_templates.name: gradient-norm-computation-fidelity
phase1_templates.prompt_focus: |reported_grad_norm(step) - norm(actual_grads(step))| / norm(actual_grads(step)) <= tol AND clip_coef(step) == max_norm / (global_norm(step) + eps) with eps added exactly once globally and normalization by dp_size/replica_count (not world_s
phase1_templates.counterexample: template-specific CE — not T3 weight inject

phase1_templates.name: producer-consumer-completion-ordering
phase1_templates.prompt_focus: FORALL (prod, cons, buf) in hazard_pairs: happens_before(complete(prod(buf)), start(cons(buf)))  -- includes: grad write before reduce-scatter, param all-gather before forward read, wgrad before all-reduce, init before DDP bucket copy, asyn
phase1_templates.counterexample: template-specific CE — not T3 weight inject

phase1_templates.name: checkpoint-restore-state-equality
phase1_templates.prompt_focus: FORALL k in state_keys: value_after_load(k) == value_at_save(k), with key mapping preserved under renames, derived caches (e.g. secondary param shards) refreshed to match restored primaries, and no re-applied transformation on load (idempot
phase1_templates.counterexample: template-specific CE — not T3 weight inject

phase1_templates.name: checkpoint-save-completeness
phase1_templates.prompt_focus: set(keys(saved_state_dict)) == set(keys(expected_state)) AND count(saved_shard_files) == expected_shard_count(topology) AND FORALL g in partition_groups: saved(g) exists
phase1_templates.counterexample: template-specific CE — not T3 weight inject

phase1_templates.name: dataloader-bookkeeping-reset
phase1_templates.prompt_focus: at each boundary b: loader_position(after b) == defined_initial(b)  -- start_index == 0 at a new epoch; bookkeeping reset between repeated runs so sample_order(run_i) == sample_order(run_j)
phase1_templates.counterexample: template-specific CE — not T3 weight inject

phase1_templates.name: scaling-scalar-finiteness
phase1_templates.prompt_focus: FORALL s in scaling_scalars(step): isfinite(s) AND (s used as denominator IMPLIES s > 0)
phase1_templates.counterexample: template-specific CE — not T3 weight inject

phase1_templates.name: counter-monotonic-progress
phase1_templates.prompt_focus: FORALL steps t: counter(t+1) >= counter(t) AND counter(t+1) - counter(t) == defined_increment(t) (no stall at 0, no per-step reset/overwrite, no negative wrap)
phase1_templates.counterexample: template-specific CE — not T3 weight inject

phase1_templates.name: positional-encoding-position-fidelity
phase1_templates.prompt_focus: FORALL tokens t on rank r: applied_rope(t, r) == rope_spec(intended_position(t), layout_cfg)  -- intended_position honors supplied position_ids, each batch element's own document boundaries, and CP shard-to-position mapping; layout_cfg hono
phase1_templates.counterexample: template-specific CE — not T3 weight inject

phase1_templates.name: loss-parameter-gradient-connectivity
phase1_templates.prompt_focus: FORALL p in trainable_params_on_active_loss_path: grad_norm(p, step) > 0 (over a window of steps), AND requires_grad_graph(loss) reaches p, AND no post-backward mask zeroes grad(p) unless its freeze/mask mode is active
phase1_templates.counterexample: template-specific CE — not T3 weight inject

phase1_templates.name: configured-value-effectiveness
phase1_templates.prompt_focus: FORALL knob k in accepted_config: effective(k, runtime) == configured(k)  -- e.g. lr_used(first_step_after_load) == scheduler(new_config), applied_softmax_scale == config.softmax_scale, checkpoint_optimizer_layout == layout(configured_optim
phase1_templates.counterexample: template-specific CE — not T3 weight inject

phase1_templates.name: packed-sequence-attention-isolation
phase1_templates.prompt_focus: FORALL token pairs (i, j) with doc(i) != doc(j): attention(i, j) == 0; equivalently output(doc_d) invariant to co-packed documents
phase1_templates.counterexample: template-specific CE — not T3 weight inject

phase1_templates.name: padding-loss-exclusion
phase1_templates.prompt_focus: FORALL positions t with token(t) == pad: loss_mask(t) == 0; equivalently count(loss_mask == 0) == count(padding_tokens) per batch
phase1_templates.counterexample: template-specific CE — not T3 weight inject

phase1_templates.name: overflow-skip-step-validity
phase1_templates.prompt_focus: FORALL steps t: skipped(t) <=> EXISTS g in grads(t): !isfinite(g); over a window: count(skipped) == count(overflow_events)
phase1_templates.counterexample: template-specific CE — not T3 weight inject

phase1_templates.name: parameter-update-effectiveness
phase1_templates.prompt_focus: NOT skipped(t) AND grad_norm(p, t) > 0 IMPLIES checksum(p, t+1) != checksum(p, t); AND id(forward_used_tensor(p)) == id(optimizer_registered_param(p))

phase1_templates.name: unrelated-operation-state-preservation
phase1_templates.prompt_focus: FORALL (x, op) with op NOT IN designated_writers(x): state(x, after op) == state(x, before op)  -- e.g. checksum(block_input) before norm == residual_addend; expert_id after hook registration == expert_id before; global_rng_state after conf

phase1_templates.name: intra-run-recomputation-determinism
phase1_templates.prompt_focus: FORALL re-executions e of computation c within step t: value(c, e) == value(c, original)  -- dropout masks under recompute equal the forward masks; bias-correction terms bit-identical across subgroup invocations
phase1_templates.counterexample: template-specific CE — not T3 weight inject

phase1_templates.prompt_focus: FORALL (t, op): layout(t, op) == expected_layout(t, parallel_cfg, op_contract)  -- shape(p2p_buffer) == shape(activation)/cp_size on the sequence dim; rank r consumes slice_r(gate) not full gate; loss tensors combined with the declared loca

phase1_templates.prompt_focus: FORALL boundaries b: count(event, b) == 1  -- tracker_increments(step) == 1 even when recompute reruns the module; saves(final_step) == 1 across restarts and never overwrite an existing valid artifact; param_sync_launches(microbatch_id) ==

phase1_templates.prompt_focus: FORALL W in initialized_params: |std(W) - spec_std(W, depth, cfg)| <= tol AND truncation_width(W) == cfg.cutoff_factor AND NOT (spec_std(W) > 0 AND std(W) == 0) AND (spec_zero(W) IMPLIES norm(W) == 0) AND stats(W) inconsistent_with_uninitia
